About Melo
~/djmelo/about.txt
Favourites
Home
Mixes
Events
Gallery
Socials
About
Book Me

DJ MELO

London-based DJ & selector. Fabric resident. Rooted in afrobeats, deep house, and UK bass. Born in Peckham, playing for the world.

8+
Years
200+
Shows
50K
Fans
12
Releases

Melo has been shaping London's underground music scene since 2018. With roots in Peckham and a sound that draws from afrobeats, deep house, and UK bass, he's become one of the city's most sought-after selectors. His residency at Fabric and international bookings speak to a global appeal built on raw talent and an unwavering connection to the dancefloor.

House98%
Afrobeats95%
Techno87%
UK Bass92%
about.txt · 1 item
